summary: Compliance/export/persistence governance verification passed after blocker fixes.

commands.command: npx biome check lib/compliance/rules.ts lib/compliance/service.ts lib/export/render.ts lib/export/service.ts lib/retention/service.ts app/api/content-packages/[id]/export/route.ts app/api/compliance/issues/[id]/dismiss/route.ts components/content/ContentPackageDetail.tsx components/content/types.ts tests/p3-contract.test.ts

adversarialEvidence: High severity compliance issues remain non-dismissible and export-blocking.
Medium severity issues require a reason, store dismissal audit fields, recompute export_allowed, and update UI state from the returned compliance check.
Export rejects malformed and unknown request bodies before mutation.
Export replays issue-level readiness, draft binding, and freshness before persisting exports.
ZIP output has PK ZIP bytes with post.md, post.html, post.txt, and export_manifest.json; UI downloads application/zip binary content.
Retention cleanup validates mode/day windows before counting or deleting and only deletes in explicit execute mode.
